title: Qualifier 105 commercial fishing vessel in dry dock at Homer, Alaska
description: The commercial fishing vessel Qualifier 105 propped up in dry dock at Homer Small Boat Harbor under overcast sky, with a work truck for scale. Documents the working waterfront that coexists with the tourist-facing Homer Spit.
alt: Commercial fishing vessel Qualifier 105 in dry dock at Homer, Alaska
